non_blocking_risks.risk: If latent demand changes materially after template compression, the template chain may need a controlled refresh rather than reuse as-is.

same_source_consistency.evidence: The discovery outputs and template outputs still refer to the same unresolved demand-formation object rather than two different problem framings.

cross_format_consistency.evidence: The template chain preserves method structure while discovery artifacts preserve uncertainty boundaries without contradiction.

fact_validation_chain.item: Confirm demand-visibility.json records explicit, latent, and field-created demand distinctions.
Confirm hypothesis-register.json records reversible assumptions and soft pruning.
Confirm template-chain.json compresses method structure without claiming that latent demand is fully stabilized.
Confirm pruning-notes.json leaves a reopening trace for discovery if new evidence later appears.

unverifiable_assumptions.item: The current latent-demand picture is stable enough for a reusable template chain to be useful without immediately becoming stale.

check.note: template-chain.json and pruning-notes.json exist and do not erase discovery uncertainty.

scope_alignment_checks.item: The round stays inside source-aligned template compression and discovery uncertainty management without widening into execution or runtime governance layers.

check.note: discovery artifacts were created before template compression was treated as stable.
template outputs exist alongside pruning notes that preserve reopen paths for future discovery.

dispatch_recommendations.item: Proceed because discovery still owns demand uncertainty while template mode compresses only the reusable method shell.

check.why: Without it, template compression would have no explicit record of which assumptions must remain reversible.
check.evidence: mode-resolution.json hands it into template_mode as an uncertainty boundary.

check.why: It is the pivot artifact between reusable method packaging and the still-open discovery layer.
check.evidence: pruning-notes.json and later replay behavior both depend on it.

evaluation_report.score_reason: The example closes the template-discovery gap, but still assumes a relatively simple discovery refresh path rather than a more complex multi-round reopening pattern.
